title: Section 84
content: (1) The utilisable water resources of the Yamuna River up to Okhla, as allocated, before the appointed day, to the existing State of Uttar Pradesh under the Memorandum of Undertakings, dated the 12th May, 1994 shall be further allocated between the successor States by mutual agreement within a period of two years, failing which, the Central Government shall, by order, determine the allocation of such water resource between the successor States within a further period of one year. (2) The State of Uttaranchal shall, on the appointed day, be inducted as a member of the Upper Yamuna Board constituted for the implementation of the Memorandum of Undertaking referred to in sub-section (1).
